lines.text: Ha, Antonio, surely you know how things work here. It's always about who pays more. Is there a problem?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Ha, since when do Montellis fret over such trivialities?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Instead of whining, maybe focus on cleaning up the mess your Echoes caused. Ha ha ha...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes
